stemHtml: What will be the effect on the FMC fuel and time predictions if the aircraft is in a non-standard configuration?

options.a: Only the next waypoint eta and remaining fuel will be accurate.
options.b: There will be no effect as FMC will make an automatic correction.
options.c: The FMC can not provide ETAs or fuel predictions.
options.d: The predicted fuel remaining will be incorrect and the pilots should watch out for this.
